headline: Vertex Pharmaceuticals receives FDA approval for CASGEVY sickle cell gene therapy
evidence: FDA approves CASGEVY first-in-class gene editing therapy for sickle cell disease

headline: Eli Lilly receives FDA approval for Mounjaro obesity indication
evidence: FDA approves Mounjaro (tirzepatide) for chronic weight management

headline: Biogen receives traditional FDA approval for Leqembi Alzheimer's treatment
evidence: FDA grants traditional approval for Leqembi (lecanemab) Alzheimer's disease

headline: Moderna receives FDA approval for mRESVIA RSV vaccine for older adults
evidence: FDA approves Moderna mRESVIA mRNA-based RSV vaccine

headline: Pfizer receives FDA approval for Paxlovid COVID-19 antiviral treatment
evidence: FDA approves Paxlovid (nirmatrelvir/ritonavir) for COVID-19 treatment

headline: Amgen receives FDA approval for Lumakras KRAS inhibitor lung cancer
evidence: FDA approves Lumakras first-in-class KRAS G12C inhibitor for NSCLC

headline: Bristol Myers Squibb receives FDA approval for Sotyktu psoriasis treatment
evidence: FDA approves Sotyktu (deucravacitinib) for moderate-to-severe plaque psoriasis

headline: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals receives complete response letter from FDA for resmetirom
evidence: FDA issues CRL for resmetirom NASH treatment requesting additional data

headline: Syndax Pharmaceuticals receives CRL from FDA for olutasidenib
evidence: FDA complete response letter CRL for olutasidenib in AML

headline: Arcus Biosciences receives FDA breakthrough therapy designation for etrumadenant
evidence: FDA grants breakthrough therapy designation for etrumadenant combination in colorectal cancer

headline: Beam Therapeutics receives FDA fast track designation for BEAM-101 sickle cell program
evidence: FDA grants fast track designation for BEAM-101 base editing therapy

headline: Recursion Pharmaceuticals receives FDA priority review for REC-994 cerebral cavernous malformation
evidence: FDA grants priority review designation PDUFA date set for REC-994
